title:
AN ACT CONVERTING SITIO VILLA NOGALES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAJAYJAY,
PROVINCE OF LAGUNA INTO A BARRIO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1207 / 67 OG No. 37, 7237 (September 13, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6205, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING SITIO VILLA NOGALES IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF MAJAYJAY,

PROVINCE OF LAGUNA INTO A BARRIO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio known as Villa Nogales, formerly a part of Barrio Malinao, Municipality of Majayjay, Province of Laguna, is hereby converted into a barrio to be known as Barrio Villa Nogales of the same municipality.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
